# allReports

**Type Property**

A convenient definition that represents every possible report ID.

## Declaration

```swift
static let allReports: ClosedRange<HIDReportID>
```

## Discussion

This can be useful when specifying the report IDs to monitor in [doc://com.apple.CoreHID/documentation/CoreHID/HIDDeviceClient/monitorNotifications(reportIDsToMonitor:elementsToMonitor:)].
title: allReports
